requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for Refrigerators (Uganda/EAC)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——电冰箱最低能效标准（MEPS）（乌干达/东非共同体）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——電冰箱最低能效標準（MEPS）（烏干達/東非共同體）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances entering Uganda are subject to minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) where the applicable Uganda/East African Community (EAC) energy-efficiency standard is in force. Uganda, as an EAC member, aligns with EAC harmonised energy-efficiency standards for refrigerating appliances, which set minimum efficiency thresholds (typically expressed through an Energy Efficiency Index or maximum annual energy consumption as a function of rated/adjusted volume) and require test results based on the IEC 62552 measurement series (Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods). Conformity is demonstrated through test reports presented within the UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and import-inspection process; refrigerators that fail to meet the MEPS threshold can be refused entry. Where a Uganda-specific MEPS regulation has not yet been gazetted for a given product sub-type, the UNBS-adopted standard and any EAC harmonised energy standard apply as the reference. [NOTE: confirm the exact in-force Uganda/EAC refrigerator MEPS threshold and effective date with UNBS before relying on a specific efficiency value.]
summary.zh: 进入乌干达的家用制冷器具，在适用的乌干达/东非共同体（EAC）能效标准生效时，须遵守最低能效标准（MEPS）。乌干达作为EAC成员，对制冷器具采用EAC协调能效标准，该类标准设定最低效率门槛（通常以能效指数或作为额定/调整容积函数的年最大耗电量表示），并要求以IEC 62552测量系列（家用制冷器具——特性和试验方法）为基础的检测结果。符合性通过在UNBS出口前符合性验证（PVoC）及进口检验流程中提交的检测报告证明；未达MEPS门槛的电冰箱可被拒绝入境。若某产品子类尚未颁布乌干达专项MEPS法规，则以UNBS采用的标准及任何EAC协调能效标准作为参考。【注：在依赖具体能效数值前，应向UNBS确认现行有效的乌干达/EAC电冰箱MEPS门槛及生效日期。】
summary.zht: 進入烏干達的家用製冷器具，在適用的烏干達/東非共同體（EAC）能效標準生效時，須遵守最低能效標準（MEPS）。烏干達作為EAC成員，對製冷器具採用EAC協調能效標準，該類標準設定最低效率門檻（通常以能效指數或作為額定/調整容積函數的年最大耗電量表示），並要求以IEC 62552測量系列（家用製冷器具——特性和試驗方法）為基礎的檢測結果。符合性通過在UNBS出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）及進口檢驗流程中提交的檢測報告證明；未達MEPS門檻的電冰箱可被拒絕入境。若某產品子類尚未頒布烏干達專項MEPS法規，則以UNBS採用的標準及任何EAC協調能效標準作為參考。【註：在依賴具體能效數值前，應向UNBS確認現行有效的烏干達/EAC電冰箱MEPS門檻及生效日期。】

standards_or_laws: Uganda/EAC minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) for household refrigerating appliances — UNBS-adopted / EAC harmonised energy-efficiency standard
IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (measurement basis for energy performance)
UNBS PVoC / import-inspection programme — energy-performance conformity demonstrated via test reports

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), which sets energy-efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and maximum annual energy-consumption limits. It is mandatory and enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label administered under NDRC/SAMR. China's measurement basis (GB/T 8059, aligned with the IEC 62552 series) is methodologically comparable to the IEC 62552 basis used by EAC MEPS, but the threshold definitions and grade boundaries differ — a Chinese efficiency grade does not map one-to-one to a Uganda/EAC MEPS pass/fail determination without recalculation against the applicable Uganda/EAC threshold.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年最大耗电量限值。该标准为强制性，由SAMR执行，中国能效标识在NDRC/SAMR下管理。中国的测量基础（GB/T 8059，参照IEC 62552系列）在方法上与EAC MEPS采用的IEC 62552基础可比，但门槛定义与等级边界不同——中国能效等级在未依据适用的乌干达/EAC门槛重新计算前，不能与乌干达/EAC MEPS的合格/不合格判定一一对应。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年最大耗電量限值。該標準為強制性，由SAMR執行，中國能效標識在NDRC/SAMR下管理。中國的測量基礎（GB/T 8059，參照IEC 62552系列）在方法上與EAC MEPS採用的IEC 62552基礎可比，但門檻定義與等級邊界不同——中國能效等級在未依據適用的烏干達/EAC門檻重新計算前，不能與烏干達/EAC MEPS的合格/不合格判定一一對應。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances test method (aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two gaps: (1) Threshold recalculation — a Chinese Grade 1/2 rating under GB 12021.2 does not guarantee a pass against the applicable Uganda/EAC MEPS threshold; the energy result (annual consumption vs adjusted volume) must be evaluated against the Uganda/EAC limit, and test data should be on the IEC 62552 basis the EAC standard references. (2) Conformity route — energy performance is verified within UNBS PVoC and import inspection rather than via a self-declared label; the Chinese Energy Label is not the Uganda conformity document. Where an in-force Uganda/EAC refrigerator MEPS has been gazetted, units below the threshold can be refused entry; manufacturers should confirm the current threshold and effective date with UNBS, as Uganda/EAC efficiency requirements have been progressively tightened.
gap.zh: 两项差距：（1）门槛重新计算——GB 12021.2下的中国1级/2级评定不保证符合适用的乌干达/EAC MEPS门槛；须以能效结果（年耗电量对调整容积）对照乌干达/EAC限值评定，且检测数据应基于EAC标准引用的IEC 62552。（2）符合性路径——能效性能在UNBS PVoC及进口检验中核实，而非通过自我声明标签；中国能效标识不是乌干达符合性文件。若已颁布现行有效的乌干达/EAC电冰箱MEPS，低于门槛的产品可被拒绝入境；制造商应向UNBS确认现行门槛及生效日期，因乌干达/EAC能效要求已逐步收紧。
gap.zht: 兩項差距：（1）門檻重新計算——GB 12021.2下的中國1級/2級評定不保證符合適用的烏干達/EAC MEPS門檻；須以能效結果（年耗電量對調整容積）對照烏干達/EAC限值評定，且檢測數據應基於EAC標準引用的IEC 62552。（2）符合性路徑——能效性能在UNBS PVoC及進口檢驗中核實，而非通過自我聲明標籤；中國能效標識不是烏干達符合性文件。若已頒布現行有效的烏干達/EAC電冰箱MEPS，低於門檻的產品可被拒絕入境；製造商應向UNBS確認現行門檻及生效日期，因烏干達/EAC能效要求已逐步收緊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where an in-force Uganda/EAC refrigerator MEPS applies — energy-performance conformity demonstrated via IEC 62552-based test reports within UNBS PVoC/import inspection; non-conforming units can be refused entry
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy-efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda/EAC MEPS conformity for refrigerators is verified within UNBS PVoC/import inspection using IEC 62552-based test data. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not map one-to-one to the Uganda/EAC threshold — the energy result must be recalculated against the applicable Uganda/EAC limit, and the Chinese Energy Label does not satisfy Uganda conformity. Confirm the current in-force threshold and effective date with UNBS before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电冰箱的乌干达/EAC MEPS符合性在UNBS PVoC/进口检验中使用IEC 62552基础检测数据核实。中国GB 12021.2等级不与乌干达/EAC门槛一一对应——须将能效结果对照适用的乌干达/EAC限值重新计算，且中国能效标识不满足乌干达符合性要求。出货前应向UNBS确认现行有效门槛及生效日期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電冰箱的烏干達/EAC MEPS符合性在UNBS PVoC/進口檢驗中使用IEC 62552基礎檢測數據核實。中國GB 12021.2等級不與烏干達/EAC門檻一一對應——須將能效結果對照適用的烏干達/EAC限值重新計算，且中國能效標識不滿足烏干達符合性要求。出貨前應向UNBS確認現行有效門檻及生效日期。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Uganda/EAC Energy Label for Refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——乌干达/东非共同体电冰箱能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——烏干達/東非共同體電冰箱能效標籤

summary.en: Where an energy-labelling requirement is in force, household refrigerators sold in Uganda must carry the applicable Uganda/East African Community (EAC) energy label displaying the efficiency rating (typically a star-rating or comparative scale derived from the EAC harmonised labelling standard), the annual energy consumption, and key product parameters. The label rating must be substantiated by test results on the IEC 62552 measurement basis and is checked within the UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and market surveillance. Unlike the EU, Uganda does not operate a centralised pre-market product-registration database analogous to EPREL; instead, the efficiency rating is verified through PVoC/CoC inspection and UNBS market surveillance at the point of sale. The label content and format follow the EAC harmonised labelling standard adopted by UNBS. [NOTE: confirm the exact in-force Uganda/EAC refrigerator energy-label scheme, rating scale, and mandatory effective date with UNBS before producing label artwork.]
summary.zh: 在能效标识要求生效时，在乌干达销售的家用电冰箱须附贴适用的乌干达/东非共同体（EAC）能效标签，标注效率评级（通常为源自EAC协调标识标准的星级或对比评级）、年耗电量及关键产品参数。标签评级须以IEC 62552测量基础的检测结果为支撑，并在UNBS出口前符合性验证（PVoC）及市场监管中核查。与欧盟不同，乌干达不设类似EPREL的集中式市场投放前产品注册数据库；效率评级通过PVoC/CoC检验及UNBS在销售点的市场监管核实。标签内容及格式遵循UNBS采用的EAC协调标识标准。【注：在制作标签图样前，应向UNBS确认现行有效的乌干达/EAC电冰箱能效标签方案、评级体系及强制生效日期。】
summary.zht: 在能效標識要求生效時，在烏干達銷售的家用電冰箱須附貼適用的烏干達/東非共同體（EAC）能效標籤，標注效率評級（通常為源自EAC協調標識標準的星級或對比評級）、年耗電量及關鍵產品參數。標籤評級須以IEC 62552測量基礎的檢測結果為支撐，並在UNBS出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）及市場監管中核查。與歐盟不同，烏干達不設類似EPREL的集中式市場投放前產品註冊數據庫；效率評級通過PVoC/CoC檢驗及UNBS在銷售點的市場監管核實。標籤內容及格式遵循UNBS採用的EAC協調標識標準。【註：在製作標籤圖樣前，應向UNBS確認現行有效的烏干達/EAC電冰箱能效標籤方案、評級體系及強制生效日期。】

standards_or_laws: Uganda/EAC energy-labelling standard for household refrigerating appliances — UNBS-adopted / EAC harmonised labelling standard
IEC 62552 series — measurement basis underlying the label rating
UNBS PVoC / market surveillance — label rating verified through inspection (no EPREL-style centralised pre-market registration database)

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision), displaying a 1-to-5 grade scale and annual energy consumption, administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR. Manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing; there is no pre-registration database. The Chinese 1-to-5 grade scheme and the Uganda/EAC label scale (star/comparative rating) are structurally different and not cross-comparable without recalculation; the Chinese CEL cannot serve as the Uganda label.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL）体系，依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订版）实施，展示1至5级评级及年耗电量，由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级；无预注册数据库。中国1至5级方案与乌干达/EAC标签评级（星级/对比评级）在结构上不同，未经重新计算不可直接比较；中国能效标识不能充当乌干达标签。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL）體系，依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂版）實施，展示1至5級評級及年耗電量，由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級；無預註冊數據庫。中國1至5級方案與烏干達/EAC標籤評級（星級/對比評級）在結構上不同，未經重新計算不可直接比較；中國能效標識不能充當烏干達標籤。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework

gap.en: Gaps: (1) Different label scheme — the Chinese CEL (1-to-5 grade) must be replaced by the applicable Uganda/EAC energy label (star/comparative rating); the rating must be re-derived from IEC 62552-based results against the Uganda/EAC labelling standard. (2) Verification route — there is no EPREL-style centralised pre-market registration; instead the rating is checked within UNBS PVoC/CoC and market surveillance at point of sale, so the label artwork and supporting test data must travel with the consignment for inspection. (3) Language/format — the label must follow the EAC/UNBS format and be presented for the Uganda market. Where the labelling requirement is not yet mandatory for a sub-type, confirm the current position with UNBS rather than assuming no obligation.
gap.zh: 差距：（1）标签方案不同——中国能效标识（1至5级）须被适用的乌干达/EAC能效标签（星级/对比评级）替换；评级须以IEC 62552基础结果对照乌干达/EAC标识标准重新得出。（2）核实路径——无EPREL式集中预注册；评级在UNBS PVoC/CoC及销售点市场监管中核查，故标签图样及支撑检测数据须随货物一同接受检验。（3）语言/格式——标签须遵循EAC/UNBS格式并面向乌干达市场。若某子类的标识要求尚未强制，应向UNBS确认现行立场，而非默认无义务。
gap.zht: 差距：（1）標籤方案不同——中國能效標識（1至5級）須被適用的烏干達/EAC能效標籤（星級/對比評級）替換；評級須以IEC 62552基礎結果對照烏干達/EAC標識標準重新得出。（2）核實路徑——無EPREL式集中預註冊；評級在UNBS PVoC/CoC及銷售點市場監管中核查，故標籤圖樣及支撐檢測數據須隨貨物一同接受檢驗。（3）語言/格式——標籤須遵循EAC/UNBS格式並面向烏干達市場。若某子類的標識要求尚未強制，應向UNBS確認現行立場，而非默認無義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where an in-force Uganda/EAC energy-labelling requirement applies — label rating verified within UNBS PVoC/CoC and market surveillance; no EPREL-style centralised pre-market registration database
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where in force, the Uganda/EAC energy label (star/comparative rating) replaces the Chinese 1-to-5 CEL — the rating must be re-derived from IEC 62552-based results against the Uganda/EAC labelling standard and verified through UNBS PVoC/CoC and market surveillance. Uganda has no EPREL-style centralised pre-market registration database. Confirm the current label scheme and mandatory date with UNBS before producing label artwork.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在生效时，乌干达/EAC能效标签（星级/对比评级）取代中国1至5级能效标识——评级须以IEC 62552基础结果对照乌干达/EAC标识标准重新得出，并通过UNBS PVoC/CoC及市场监管核实。乌干达无EPREL式集中预注册数据库。制作标签图样前应向UNBS确认现行标签方案及强制日期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在生效時，烏干達/EAC能效標籤（星級/對比評級）取代中國1至5級能效標識——評級須以IEC 62552基礎結果對照烏干達/EAC標識標準重新得出，並通過UNBS PVoC/CoC及市場監管核實。烏干達無EPREL式集中預註冊數據庫。製作標籤圖樣前應向UNBS確認現行標籤方案及強制日期。
